---
id: webhook-delivery-item-show
title: "Get a specific delivery item of a webhook"
description: "Get the specified delivery item of an outgoing webhook of a Bitrise application"
sidebar_label: "Get a specific delivery item of a webhook"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api:

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get a specific delivery item of a webhook"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/apps/{app-slug}/outgoing-webhooks/{app-webhook-slug}/delivery-items/{webhook-delivery-item-slug}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Get the specified delivery item of an outgoing webhook of a Bitrise application

  as={"h2"}
